meaning: 奥法利郡[爱尔兰共和国郡名]
examples: It was brought to my attention that my grandfather on my mother's side hailed from a small village in County Offaly.
It was brought to my attention last year that my great-great-great-grandfather on my mother's side hailed from a small village in County Offaly.
More than 300 people attended the funeral of Miss Gowing in Kinnitty, County Offaly, in January.
The joint managers saw their side heavily beaten by Offaly in Saturday's relegation play-off in Dublin.
The family of Ms Gowing, originally from Kinnity, near Birr, in County Offaly, has been informed.
